Our Story

Food That Feels Like Home

"Aai Cha Swad" means the taste of a mother's hands in Marathi — and that's exactly what we bring to your doorstep. Every meal is cooked fresh with love, spices sourced locally, and recipes passed down through generations.

Whether you're a student, a working professional, or simply someone craving a wholesome meal away from home — our tiffin is your daily hug in a box.

500+
Happy Customers
3 yrs
Of Serving Love
100%
Fresh Daily
What We Serve

Our Delicious Menu

Every meal comes with Rice, Chapati & Sabji — plus a rotating daily special made with seasonal, fresh ingredients.

DAILY STAPLE

Soft Chapati

Fresh whole-wheat rotis cooked on a hot tawa — soft, fluffy, and made with ghee.

DAILY STAPLE

Steamed Basmati Rice

Perfectly cooked fluffy basmati rice — the comfort foundation of every tiffin.

DAILY SABJI

Seasonal Vegetable Curry

Fresh sabji cooked with authentic Maharashtrian spices, changes daily.

ROTATING SPECIAL

Dal Tadka / Kadhi

Aromatic lentil dal or tangy Maharashtrian Kadhi — a different special each day of the week.

NON-VEG BASE

Chapati + Rice

Fresh roti and steamed rice paired with bold non-veg curries.

EGG SPECIAL

Egg Kadhi / Egg Curry

Rich, spiced egg curry with hard-boiled eggs in a masala gravy — pure comfort.

CHICKEN MEAL

Chicken Curry

Tender chicken pieces in a slow-cooked, spiced Maharashtrian gravy. ₹150/- only!

SIDES

Non-Veg Flavoured Rice

Rice cooked alongside non-veg curries absorbing all the delicious masala flavours.

Weekly Dinner Schedule (Veg)

MondayRice · Chapati · Sabji · Matar Paneer
TuesdayRice · Chapati · Sabji · Dal Tadka
WednesdayRice · Chapati · Gravy Chicken
ThursdayRice · Chapati · Sabji · Lal Lobai
FridayRice · Chapati · Egg Kadhi
SaturdayRice · Chapati · Sabji · Kadhi

🎁 Weekly Surprise Dessert — FREE! Kabhi bhi, ek week mein!
